title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A video tutorial on AWS CDK with Python for building serverless REST APIs on AWS. The content covers Infrastructure as Code concepts, compares IaC tools, and demonstrates building a CRUD API using DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway through both manual console setup and CDK automation.
